title: Netro
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Netro.jpg]] |name=Netro |homeworld=[[Ganath/Legends|Ganath]][[Dark Empire II 5|''Dark Empire II'' 5]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Ganathan]] |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Ganathan Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Netro… Adjust the ''ceramic coils'' to optimal current—this ship's power plant will ''double'' the usual charge!"
"Yes, King Empatojayos!|Empatojayos Brand and Netro|}} '''Netro''' was a [[Ganathan]] [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] who worked on repairs of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] on the orders of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Empatojayos Brand]]. ==Appearances== *[[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]] *[[Dark Empire II 5|''Dark Empire II'' 5]] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Netro |es=Netro }} [[Category:Ganathans]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Mechanics]]
